About Drylining Edinburgh

Your trusted drylining contractors in Edinburgh and Central Scotland. Quality workmanship, transparent pricing, and a commitment to every project.

Drylining Edinburgh is a team of experienced drylining contractors dedicated to delivering high-quality partition walls, suspended ceilings, and plasterboard installations across Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, Musselburgh, and the surrounding Lothians and Central Scotland region. We combine traditional craftsmanship with modern techniques to produce interiors that look exceptional and stand the test of time.

Founded on the principles of honesty, reliability, and quality, we have built a reputation as one of the most trusted drylining companies in Scotland's capital. Every member of our team is CSCS accredited, fully trained, and committed to maintaining the highest standards of workmanship and site safety.

What We Believe In

We believe that great drylining is about more than just fixing boards to walls. It is about understanding the client's vision, respecting their property, and delivering a finish that exceeds expectations. Whether it is a single-room renovation or a multi-floor commercial fit-out, we treat every project with the same level of care and professionalism.

Our Credentials

  • CSCS accredited contractors on every project
  • £1 million public liability insurance
  • Fully compliant with health and safety regulations
  • Years of experience in residential and commercial drylining
  • Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
  • Free, no-obligation quotes with fast response times

Areas We Serve

We are based in Edinburgh and regularly work in Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, Musselburgh, and surrounding towns and villages. For larger commercial projects, we are happy to travel further across Central Scotland.
